Text:
Guardare all'Italia per vedere come la pericolosa idea di "remigrazione" sta prendendo piede in Europa

siamo sempre all'avanguardia

www.theguardian.com/commentisfre...

Links.Title: Look to Italy to see how the dangerous idea of ‘remigration’ is taking root in Europe | David Broder
Links.Description: To even be talking about this drastic deportation policy is a sign the far right is winning, says author David Broder

ValueAnalysis.Reasoning: The post critiques a far-right policy ('remigration') through an external reference, reflecting strong independent thought (4) and tolerance (4) by challenging exclusionary ideologies. It also subtly critiques power dynamics (3) and societal inequality (5), while the framing of the issue as a 'dangerous idea' aligns with stimulation (3) and a call for broader ethical reflection. The absence of personal or material concerns (e.g., pleasure, wealth) underscores its focus on systemic critique rather than individual gain.

Text: Negata sala convegni al comitato di estrema destra 'Remigrazione'

Links.Title: Negata sala convegni al comitato di estrema destra 'Remigrazione' - Notizie - Ansa.it
Links.Description: Proprietaria hotel: 'Hanno avuto un modo ingannevole di comportarsi' (ANSA)

ValueAnalysis.Reasoning: The post reflects a strong adherence to *Lawfulness* (6) by explicitly denying a venue to an extreme-right group, aligning with institutional norms and legal obligations. It also demonstrates *Tolerance* (5) by implicitly rejecting exclusionary or discriminatory behavior, though the framing is procedural rather than explicitly moral or empathetic. No other values are directly engaged, as the focus is on institutional compliance rather than personal or societal values.

Text:
"Via dall'Italia 3,3 milioni di persone". Il think tank dei supporter della remigrazione quantifica i numeri della deportazione
www.huffingtonpost.it/politica/202...

Links.Title: "Via dall'Italia 3,3 milioni di persone". Il think tank dei supporter della remigrazione quantifica i numeri della deportazione - HuffPost Italia
Links.Description: Per la prima volta il White Paper Policy Institute, think tank legato all'estrema destra americana, quantifica le persone che dovrebbero essere allontanate…

ValueAnalysis.Reasoning: The post reflects a strong emphasis on **Power** (5) as it promotes an exclusionary, authoritarian policy agenda (deportation) linked to a far-right think tank, reinforcing hierarchical control and marginalization. The framing aligns with **Power** as a mechanism of social domination, while all other values—particularly **Equality**, **Tolerance**, and **Caring**—are explicitly undermined. The absence of humility, respect, or responsibility underscores a **zero-sum** approach to societal security, prioritizing exclusionary control over inclusive values.

Text:
#persone #remigrazione #Vannacci #fascismo #deportazione
Se il delirio si perde in un buco sempre più profondo, sempre più nero.
Oggi per @mm-repubblica-bot.bsky.social

ValueAnalysis.Reasoning: The post lacks substantive content beyond hashtags and a cryptic, metaphorical statement ('Se il delirio si perde in un buco sempre più profondo, sempre più nero'), which evokes a sense of existential or societal decay but does not explicitly reflect any of the listed concepts. The hashtags (#persone, #remigrazione, #Vannacci, #fascismo, #deportazione) suggest thematic connections to migration, political extremism, and human rights, but the post itself does not articulate values, actions, or commitments tied to these themes. The brevity and ambiguity preclude meaningful alignment with any of the 19 concepts, though the hashtags *could* imply latent concerns about societal security or equality if expanded upon. The rating reflects the absence of explicit reflection.

Text:
Eccoli, più fascisti dei fascisti. 

Il Foglio scrive che la Lega sarebbe prossima a presentare una proposta di legge sulla “remigrazione”: il testo mira al rimpatrio, anche forzato, dei migranti, inclusi quelli regolari, con incentivi al rientro e misure contro chi ha commesso reati.

ValueAnalysis.Reasoning: The post critiques a political proposal (Lega’s 'remigrazione' bill) framed as a return to authoritarian traditions, reflecting strong alignment with *Power* (political control over migration) and *Tradition* (evoking fascist nostalgia). The tone is confrontational, emphasizing *Reputation* (defending a media outlet’s stance) and *Stimulation* (provocative framing), while explicitly rejecting *Equality*, *Tolerance*, and *Caring* values. The absence of humility or respect underscores its combative, ideological stance.

Text: La contestata proposta di legge di iniziativa popolare sulla “remigrazione” ha raggiunto le 50 mila firme per essere presentata in Parlamento. Ecco che cosa prevede:

Links.Title: Remigrazione: che cosa prevede la proposta di legge di iniziativa popolare
Links.Description: Dopo il blocco della conferenza stampa alla Camera, il testo ha superato le 50 mila firme e sarà presentato in...

ValueAnalysis.Reasoning: The post describes a legislative proposal ('remigrazione') framed as a formal, rule-based initiative (lawfulness: 5), emphasizing procedural compliance (50,000 signatures, parliamentary presentation) without explicit moral or social values. No evidence of personal agency, emotional engagement, or systemic critiques (e.g., equality, tolerance) beyond the procedural act itself.

Text:
📢 La cittadinanza non si eredita: si conquista.
💬 #ReImmigrazione è il modello per costruire un'appartenenza reale.
Scopri di più 👉 www.reimmigrazione.com
#Remigrazione #Integrazione #PoliticheMigratorie

Links.Title: Integrazione o ReImmigrazione
Links.Description: Serve un nuovo paradigma: ‘Integrazione o ReImmigrazione’. Perché l’immigrazione non è un diritto, l’integrazione è un dovere

ValueAnalysis.Reasoning: The post reflects a strong emphasis on **Power** (4) through its assertive framing of immigration policy as a tool for social control and belonging, positioning itself as a dominant narrative. **Reputation** (5) is evident in its attempt to establish a new ideological paradigm ('ReImmigrazione') as a legitimate and authoritative stance. **Lawfulness** (3) is implied by the framing of integration as a 'duty' rather than a right, aligning with a rigid, rule-based approach to migration. The post lacks values like **Equality**, **Tolerance**, or **Caring**, instead prioritizing a hierarchical, exclusionary vision of societal order.

Text:
"mentre la classe media combatte una guerra immaginaria per difendere la razza o la mascolinità contro la "grande sostituzione”, l'oligarchia acquisisce gli asset reali del pianeta"

#musk #thiel

ValueAnalysis.Reasoning: The post critiques systemic power dynamics and wealth accumulation by elites (Wealth: 6, Power: 5) while framing the middle class's cultural anxieties (e.g., 'great replacement') as a distraction from material realities. It reflects critical independent thought (6) by exposing structural inequalities and questioning dominant narratives, though it lacks direct calls for action (Independent actions: 0) or moral concern (Caring/Equality: 0). The framing is provocative and stimulating (4), targeting societal power structures rather than personal or traditional values.

Text:
#Trump ha ragione, è ora di rimandare a casa tutti gli immigrati, hanno ormai invaso tutta l’America
#immigrazione

ValueAnalysis.Reasoning: The post reflects a strong emphasis on **power** (authoritarian framing of immigration control) and **reputation** (aligning with a polarizing political figure to signal ideological loyalty). It subtly invokes **personal security** (fear of 'invasion') and **societal security** (broad claims about cultural disruption), but lacks nuance on **equality, tolerance, or caring**. The language is exclusionary, prioritizing symbolic dominance over ethical or systemic considerations, aligning with Schwartz’s critique of 'paradox of choice' in identity politics—here, reducing immigration to a zero-sum moral binary.

Text:
Ai vari Barbero,
Travaglio,  Salvini,Conte , Di Battista, Orsini e
 tutta la loro marmaglia di sostenitori auguro notti tormentate dalle anime di queste vittime... 
Meglio ancora sarebbe fargli provare  l' ebrezza di essere inseguiti da un drone russo 🤬

ValueAnalysis.Reasoning: The post reflects a strong emphasis on **Power** (4) through aggressive, vengeful rhetoric targeting political figures, framed as a form of symbolic retribution. The **Stimulation** (3) arises from the visceral, provocative language (e.g., 'ebbrezza di essere inseguiti da un drone russo'), which evokes emotional intensity and conflict. The absence of other values is clear: no concern for **Respect**, **Humility**, **Caring**, or **Equality** is evident, nor is there any reference to **Independent Thoughts** or **Actions** beyond the post’s own performative aggression. The post aligns with a **Schadenfreude**-driven, adversarial stance, prioritizing dominance and spectacle over ethical or systemic considerations.

Text:
"Tutte le idee vanno rispettate. Il #fascismo, no.
Non è un’idea. È la morte di tutte le idee" (Sandro Pertini)

#Remigrazione
#Casapound

ValueAnalysis.Reasoning: The post strongly emphasizes *independent thoughts* (defending intellectual freedom) and *respect* (rejecting fascism as a violation of pluralism), while also aligning with *equality* (implied critique of authoritarianism) and *tolerance* (advocating for acceptance of diverse ideas). The hashtags (#Remigrazione, #Casapound) introduce *stimulation* through political provocation, though the core message leans toward intellectual and moral values over material or power-based concerns. The absence of personal or societal security, tradition, or caring reflects a focus on abstract principles over relational or material outcomes.

Text:
Deputati di Pd, M5s e Avs occupano la sala stampa della Camera per bloccare una conferenza sulla “remigrazione” con esponenti di CasaPound e gruppi neofascisti.

 “Difesa della Costituzione antifascista”. 

www.articolo21.org/2026/01/lopp...

Links.Title: L'opposizione blocca la conferenza stampa di Casapound. Cantando "Bella ciao". Marsella: torneremo - Articolo21
Links.Description: Un gruppo di deputati di Pd, M5s e Avs ha occupato la sala stampa della Camera in mattinata dove era prevista la conferenza stampa sulla remigrazione con il portavoce di Casapound Luca Marsella, Ivan ...

ValueAnalysis.Reasoning: The post reflects a collective action by deputies to disrupt a far-right event, framing it as a defense of antifascist constitutional values. This strongly aligns with **responsibility** (upholding democratic norms), **equality** (countering exclusionary ideologies), and **lawfulness** (acting within institutional frameworks). **Independent action** and **independent thought** are evident in their proactive challenge to neofascist discourse, while **societal security** and **tolerance** are underscored by their stance against extremism. The **power** dynamic is implicit in their symbolic occupation of institutional space, and **stimulation** arises from the confrontational, politically charged context. **Caring** is expressed through their commitment to democratic values and marginalized groups.

Text:
Io sono favorevole ad un certo tipo di remigrazione. 

Quella dei fascisti nelle fogne.

ValueAnalysis.Reasoning: The post reflects a radical critique of fascism and a provocative stance on 'remigration,' which aligns strongly with independent thought (6) as it challenges conventional norms and expresses a bold, unconventional perspective. It also subtly engages with equality (5) by targeting a group associated with oppression, framing their exclusion as a form of justice. The tone is confrontational and lacks elements of caring, humility, or traditional values, while the call for action is implicit rather than explicit in terms of independent action. The concept of tolerance is absent due to the post's explicit rejection of fascist ideology rather than an embrace of diversity.

Text:
Lo dico nel peggiore dei modi, utilizzando termini che non uso mai, perché credo nella comunicazione gentile, però ci sono dei limiti, che ho superato ormai da tempo. Sapere che casapound domani sarà alla Camera a parlare di remigrazione, mi fa orrore, e vaffanculo
#noninmionome

ValueAnalysis.Reasoning: The post reflects strong independent thought (5) by rejecting polite communication in favor of blunt critique of a political movement, and independent action (4) through explicit rejection of complicity. It also aligns with equality (5) by opposing exclusionary rhetoric ('remigration') and rejecting normalization of harmful discourse. The use of profanity and defiance ('vaffanculo') signals moral boundaries and a refusal to engage with oppressive ideologies, reinforcing a stance against systemic injustice.

Text:
Domani la Lega darà spazio a una proposta sulla “remigrazione” con gruppi neofascisti come CasaPound.
Persino Fontana, presidente della Camera e leghista, ne prende le distanze.
Chi porta l'odio nelle istituzioni è una minaccia per la democrazia e Volt non starà zitta.

Images.Alt: Slide Instagram di Volt Italia con sfondo viola e titolo “Fuori i neofascisti e le loro idee aberranti dalle istituzioni”. Foto di Lorenzo Fontana. Cita l’ANSA sul caso della conferenza alla Camera sulla “remigrazione” con estrema destra.

ValueAnalysis.Reasoning: The post critiques far-right political alliances (Lega and CasaPound) and frames their extremism as a threat to democratic values, emphasizing *independent thought* (rejecting mainstream normalization of hate groups) and *independent action* (Volt’s refusal to remain silent). It strongly aligns with *responsibility* (defending democracy) and *equality* (condemning exclusionary ideologies), while *tolerance* is central to its rejection of neofascist rhetoric. The framing also subtly critiques institutional *power* dynamics (e.g., Fontana’s distancing) and *stimulation* through the provocative framing of 'remigration' as a divisive issue.

Text:
Domani a #Brescia si terrà l'incontro "Prevenire e contrastare il discorso d'odio", con un focus sul termine tristemente attuale "remigrazione".

L'iniziativa aperta alla cittadinanza è promossa dal Tavolo Interistituzionale per la prevenzione e il contrasto dei discorsi d'odio al quale partecipo.

ValueAnalysis.Reasoning: The post reflects a strong commitment to societal values of lawfulness, respect, caring, responsibility, equality, and tolerance by organizing an event against hate speech and promoting civic engagement. The focus on 'remigration' as a contemporary issue underscores a dedication to addressing marginalized voices and fostering inclusive dialogue, aligning with Schwartz’s emphasis on collective well-being and social justice. The institutional participation suggests a balance between personal reputation and broader ethical responsibility.

Text:
🧱 ReImmigrazione ≠ Remigrazione
La prima è fondata sul diritto, la seconda sulla rabbia.
📚 Un articolo che spiega perché l’integrazione deve essere una condizione, non un’illusione.
🔗 reimmigrazione.com/2025/06/22/r...
#ReImmigrazione #Remigrazione

Links.Title: ReImmigrazione vs. Remigration: A Civil Response to a Radical Problem
Links.Description: Authored by Fabio Loscerbo, Immigration Lawyer and Registered Lobbyist (EU Transparency Register ID: 280782895721-36) In today’s European debate on immigration, dominated by extremes, clarity is ur…

ValueAnalysis.Reasoning: The post critiques extremist immigration narratives by advocating for a rights-based approach ('ReImmigrazione') over punitive or exclusionary policies ('Remigrazione'), reflecting strong emphasis on legal compliance (Lawfulness: 5) and respect for human dignity (Respect: 4). It positions integration as a conditional but necessary process, aligning with responsibility (Responsibility: 4) and independent thought (Independent thoughts: 5) by challenging simplistic or emotional responses. The author’s professional role as a lobbyist suggests a strategic engagement with power structures (Power: 1) and reputation (Reputation: 3), though the focus remains on reasoned discourse rather than material or ideological extremes. The framing rejects both pleasure-seeking (Pleasure: 0) and tolerance of radicalization (Tolerance: 0), prioritizing structured, lawful solutions over reactive or exclusionary impulses.

Text: Io comincerei con la remigrazione di quelli di CasaPound da dove sono venuti, cioè a Fanculo.

ValueAnalysis.Reasoning: The post reflects a radical, confrontational stance emphasizing independent thought and action (6) as it rejects institutional or traditional norms (e.g., 'remigration' as a direct, uncompromising solution). It also aligns with a rejection of power structures (e.g., targeting CasaPound, a far-right group) and a symbolic assertion of agency ('a Fanculo'—a vulgar dismissal of authority). The language is provocative and disruptive, evoking stimulation (5) and a critique of systemic inequality (5), though it lacks concern for caring, responsibility, or tolerance. The tone is defiant, prioritizing personal autonomy over societal norms or legal compliance.

Text:
Alekos Prete
@AlekosPrete

Svastiche, croci celtiche e adesso pure la “remigrazione” contro la libreria Belleville e il circolo Arci di Bruino.
Colpire chi fa cultura è sempre il passatempo preferito dei fascisti. #matrice

ValueAnalysis.Reasoning: The post critiques fascist symbols (svastikas, Celtic crosses) and the concept of 'remigration' as attacks on cultural spaces (libreria Belleville, Arci circolo), framing it as a threat to democratic values and pluralism. It strongly reflects **equality** (opposing exclusionary ideologies) and **tolerance** (defending marginalized cultural spaces), while also emphasizing **caring** for cultural preservation and **responsibility** to counter fascist rhetoric. The absence of personal or material gain or stimulation aligns with a focus on collective justice and anti-fascist solidarity.

Text: “Fuori i nazisti, Nazis raus!”In 70 città della Germania scendono in piazza decine di migliaia di tedeschi a protestare contro il partito nazista AfD,sponsorizzato da Musk a un mese dalle elezioni(che anche Putin vuol manipolare). Il #nwo manipola elezioni da tempo (vds Trump,14milioni voti spariti)

ValueAnalysis.Reasoning: The post reflects a strong collective call for societal security (6) by protesting against far-right extremism, aligning with values of equality (6) and caring (6) for democratic principles. The emphasis on mass mobilization and resistance to manipulation underscores independent action (5) and stimulation (5) through civic engagement. The framing critiques systemic threats (e.g., election interference) and aligns with responsibility (5) and tolerance (5) by opposing exclusionary ideologies. No direct focus on personal security, tradition, or materialistic values.
